scripts.pipeline:sprint9: node scripts/generate-sprint9-questions.js && node scripts/validate-question-bank.js && node scripts/validate-grammar-map.js && node scripts/generate-question-factory-reports.js && node scripts/report-question-bank-quality.js --output reports/question-bank-quality.md
scripts.pipeline:sprint10: node scripts/generate-sprint10-questions.js && node scripts/validate-question-bank.js && node scripts/validate-grammar-map.js && node scripts/generate-question-factory-reports.js && node scripts/report-question-bank-quality.js --output reports/question-bank-quality.md
scripts.pipeline:sprint11: node scripts/generate-knowledge-cards.js && node scripts/validate-question-bank.js && node scripts/validate-grammar-map.js && node scripts/validate-knowledge-cards.js && node scripts/generate-question-factory-reports.js && node scripts/report-question-bank-quality.js --output reports/question-bank-quality.md
scripts.pipeline:sprint12: node scripts/generate-sprint12-questions.js && node scripts/generate-knowledge-cards.js && node scripts/validate-question-bank.js && node scripts/validate-grammar-map.js && node scripts/validate-knowledge-cards.js && node scripts/generate-question-factory-reports.js && node scripts/report-question-bank-quality.js --output reports/question-bank-quality.md
